PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Whiteman, Esq., counsel for Donald Kong, Petitioner (appearing by video conference).

The Court advise Mr. Whiteman as to the required decorum when engaging with Court staff. Mr. Whiteman acknowledges the same and thereafter advises the Court that the required Duties and Liabilities form had been filed then rejected and re-submitted for filing again. After research by the Clerk, it is determined that the form was re-submitted for filing but rejected yet again for incomplete case number.

After further discussion, the Court notes that the petition is otherwise in order and takes the same under submission. Upon general query and hearing no objection, the Court admits the Will dated July 11, 2019 to probate. Donald Kong is appointed the Executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is waived. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on June 20, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
